name: publish_x
description: Publish one client's approved, voice_qa-passed post_draft to X (Twitter) via the X API — the PRIMARY publish platform (instant pay-per-use API access, no partner review). Called by the publisher specialist only after a fresh, per-post agency_approve exists. Never publishes without approval; never batches multiple clients' posts into one call.

text.description: Exact post text, sourced verbatim from post_draft.text — the tool does not rewrite or truncate content.

approval_id.description: The single-use approval_id authorizing this exact publish.

approval_policy.description: Exactly one approval (single WhatsApp reply, or one individually-recorded entry resolved from an agency_approve_batch fan-out) is required per post before this call is permitted. Never available for a post whose voice_qa_report isn't already gate_result: pass.

side_effects: Publishes a real, publicly visible post to the client's X account.
Irreversible via this tool (no unpublish/delete capability exposed).
